caption: A video segment shows a split-screen broadcast celebrating a political event. The top banner of the screen features the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" along with lotus logos and the words "प्रजाजनमनेत्री" and "दिल्ली". The bottom section displays social media handles, including "@BJP4India" and the website "bjp.org/bjplive". On the left side of the split-screen, Narendra Modi is seen wearing a white kurta and a colorful stole, speaking and gesturing with his hand. On the right side, a group of people are seated in an audience; some wear traditional white clothing and orange caps, and they are seen clapping. As the scene progresses, the audience view shifts to show different participants, including women in traditional attire, who are also clapping. The background behind Narendra Modi consists of a repeating pattern of lotus logos.
